payload.answer: Stored as a low-confidence, time-relative note: Sam said last Friday that he plans to leave Goldman next month.

entity_resolution.reason: Only 'Sam' and 'Goldman' are mentioned without unique identifiers; time anchors ('last Friday', 'next month') are relative/ambiguous.

memory_cards.statement: Sam said that he is leaving Goldman next month (he said this last Friday).

details: Created a tentative memory card with relative time ('last Friday', 'next month').

repair_options: Confirm Sam's full identity (e.g., last name) to disambiguate.
Convert 'next month' and 'last Friday' into exact dates.
Confirm whether the plan is definite or subject to change.
